response.justification: Candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, strong testing discipline (TDD), and exposure to high-throughput systems at Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the core of this Principal IC6 role. There is also limited evidence of Principal-level cross-team architectural leadership or growth/measurement systems work at enterprise scale.
strengths: 13+ years across diverse stacks with strong TDD/CI-CD craftsmanship
High-throughput micro-services experience at Sociomantic (millions of req/s)
Founder/open-source leadership demonstrates systemic thinking and ownership
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
Lacks explicit telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis background
Title progression (Senior/Staff) does not clearly reflect Principal/IC6 scope of multi-team platform leadership
